\begin{center}{\Large\bfseries Rovibrational analysis: Li\_Omega}\\[2pt]
{\small Sinc-DVR (Colbert--Miller) + sixth-degree Rydberg potential}\end{center}
\noindent Reduced mass $\mu = 12549.06992\ m_e$ (6.88417 amu). Grid: 500 sinc-DVR points on the CSV range. Level count is automatic: all bound states below $D_e$.
\vspace{4pt}
